package rulefixtures

// scenario for waitgroup_add_inside_loop: `for { wg.Add(1); go func() { ... wg.Done() }() }` where `wg.Add` could be called once before the loop with the count
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule693NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario693Negative(records []Rule693NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
